steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
Compare $f(x+1)$ to $f(x)$:
$$f(x+1)=72b^{x+1}=72b^x\cdot b=b\cdot f(x)$$
So each increase of $1$ in $x$ multiplies the value by $b$.

steps.title: Convert factor to percent
steps.content: A multiplier of $b$ represents an increase of $b-1$ times the original value. As a percent, that is $$100(b-1)$$ The answer is D.
